project.name: collabryx
project.description: AI-Powered Collaborative Platform with Next.js 16, React 19, and Supabase, featuring vector-based profile matching, real-time messaging, 3D visualizations, and enterprise-grade security.

nodes.label: ProficiencyRing Component
nodes.summary: Animated SVG ring chart component displaying proficiency levels (beginner/intermediate/advanced/expert) with color-coded arcs, labels, and Framer Motion animations. Imports utility modules but no other UI components.
nodes.details: Uses framer-motion for ring fill animation and hover effects. Respects reduced-motion preferences via useReducedMotion hook. The 4 levels map to 25/50/75/100% completion with distinct colors (blue/green/yellow/orange). Exports type ProficiencyLevel.
nodes.name: components/ui/proficiency-ring.tsx

nodes.label: ScrollArea Component
nodes.summary: Custom scrollable container using Radix scroll-area primitive with styled scrollbar (vertical + horizontal). Supports sized scrollbar thumb.
nodes.details: Composes ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root, Viewport, ScrollBar, and Corner. ScrollBar supports both vertical and horizontal orientations with touch-friendly sizing. 'use client' directive.
nodes.name: components/ui/scroll-area.tsx

nodes.label: ScrollBasedVelocity Animation
nodes.summary: Scroll-velocity-driven horizontal scrolling animation. Uses Framer Motion's useScroll/useVelocity to create parallax-like horizontal movement that accelerates with scroll speed.
nodes.details: Context-based system: ScrollVelocityContainer provides velocity via context, ScrollVelocityRow consumes it. Falls back to local velocity if no parent container. Uses ResizeObserver for responsive sizing, IntersectionObserver for inview tracking, and page visibility detection. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
nodes.name: components/ui/scroll-based-velocity.tsx

nodes.label: ScrollReveal Component
nodes.summary: Intersection Observer based scroll-triggered fade-in animation. Reveals children with opacity + translateY transition when scrolled into viewport.
nodes.details: Simple single-shot observer: triggers once on intersection, then disconnects. Configurable threshold and delay. Uses CSS transitions rather than Framer Motion for lightweight animation.
nodes.name: components/ui/scroll-reveal.tsx

nodes.label: SearchableCombobox Component
nodes.summary: Feature-rich multi-select combobox with search, categories, badges, and custom option creation. Integrates Popover, Command, Badge, Button, and ScrollArea primitives.
nodes.details: Supports option grouping by category, keyword-based searching across label/description/keywords, custom value creation via Enter key or button, selected items displayed as removable Badges with X buttons. Uses Popover for dropdown, Command for search/list pattern. Implements fixed-height layout to prevent CLS.
nodes.name: components/ui/searchable-combobox.tsx

nodes.label: Select Component
nodes.summary: Radix UI select dropdown with glass morphism styling. Full suite of subcomponents: Trigger, Content, Item, Label, Group, Separator, scroll buttons.
nodes.details: SelectContent applies glass('dropdown') variant for backdrop blur. Supports size variants (sm/default) on Trigger. Uses portal for overflow rendering. Includes scroll up/down indicator buttons. Exports all Radix Select subcomponents.
nodes.name: components/ui/select.tsx

nodes.label: Sheet Component
nodes.summary: Slide-in panel/drawer using Radix Dialog. Supports 4 sides (top/right/bottom/left) with glass morphism overlay and content. Full screen-reader support.
nodes.details: Composed of SheetTrigger, SheetClose, SheetOverlay (with glass variant), SheetContent (with glass card variant), SheetHeader, SheetFooter, SheetTitle, SheetDescription. Animated slide-in/out per side. Close button with XIcon. Fixed z-50 stacking.
nodes.name: components/ui/sheet.tsx

nodes.label: ShinyText Component
nodes.summary: Animated text highlight/shine effect using CSS gradient animation. Configurable speed and disabled state.
nodes.details: Applies a diagonal linear gradient as background-image with background-size animation to create a shimmer effect across text. Uses animate-shine class. Can be disabled to show static muted text.
nodes.name: components/ui/shiny-text.tsx

nodes.label: Slider Component
nodes.summary: Radix UI range slider with track, range fill, and draggable thumb. Supports both horizontal and vertical orientations.
nodes.details: Wraps @radix-ui/react-slider. Forwarded ref for imperative control. Track shows background, Range shows filled portion, Thumb is circular and focusable. Respects disabled state.
nodes.name: components/ui/slider.tsx

nodes.label: SmoothCursor Component
nodes.summary: Custom animated mouse cursor with spring physics. Replaces the default cursor with a configurable SVG cursor that rotates based on movement velocity.
nodes.details: Uses Framer Motion's useSpring for smooth position following, rotation accumulates based on directional changes. Scale dips on movement. Hides on touch devices and when hovering over header elements. Default cursor is an SVG cursor arrow with drop shadow. RAF-throttled mousemove handler for performance.
nodes.name: components/ui/smooth-cursor.tsx

nodes.label: Sonner Toaster Component
nodes.summary: Toast notification provider wrapper for the sonner library. Themed to match the app's dark theme with custom icons for success/info/warning/error/loading states.
nodes.details: Gets resolvedTheme from ThemeProvider. Maps sonner's built-in toast types to custom lucide icons. Sets CSS variables for popover theming. Exports Toaster component.
nodes.name: components/ui/sonner.tsx

nodes.label: StreamBoundary & Loading Skeletons
nodes.summary: Suspense boundary components and domain-specific loading skeletons for streaming data. Provides reusable StreamBoundary wrapper and skeleton layouts for dashboard/matches/messages.
nodes.details: Exports LoadingSkeleton (configurable line count), StreamBoundary (Suspense wrapper), ParallelRoute (parallel streaming layout), CardSkeleton, DashboardSkeleton (3 col grid + list), MatchesSkeleton (6-card grid), MessagesSkeleton (sidebar + chat layout). Uses Framer Motion for pulse animation.
nodes.name: components/ui/streaming-boundaries.tsx

nodes.label: Switch Component
nodes.summary: Custom toggle switch implemented with a hidden checkbox input. Peer-styled with CSS for on/off states and focus ring.
nodes.details: Uses sr-only checkbox with peer modifier to style the visual switch track. Thumb slides via translate-full on checked. Forwarded ref for form integration. No Radix dependency.
nodes.name: components/ui/switch.tsx

nodes.label: Table Component
nodes.summary: Semantic HTML table component with Header, Body, Footer, Row, Head, Cell, and Caption subcomponents. Responsive with horizontal overflow.
nodes.details: Wraps native HTML table elements with consistent styling. Table has overflow-auto container for horizontal scroll. Row hover state, selected state support. Consistent padding and typography tokens.
nodes.name: components/ui/table.tsx

nodes.label: Tabs Component
nodes.summary: Radix UI tabs with glass morphism styling on the tab list. Animated active tab indicator with backdrop blur.
nodes.details: TabsList uses glass('dropdown') variant. TabsTrigger uses glass('tabInactive') with active state showing bg-background/50 + backdrop-blur. 'use client' directive. Exports Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent.
nodes.name: components/ui/tabs.tsx

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.summary: Radix UI tooltip with portal rendering, animated content, and arrow indicator. Zero delay by default for instant appearance.
nodes.details: Internal TooltipProvider wrapping every Root. Content uses Portal for overflow rendering. Animated entrance/exit. Includes styled arrow element. Side offset configurable.
nodes.name: components/ui/tooltip.tsx

nodes.label: ValidationMessage Component
nodes.summary: Animated validation feedback messages with 4 variants (error/success/warning/info). Features gradient overlays, glow effects, auto-dismiss with progress bar, and dismissible option.
nodes.details: Variants each have distinct colors, background, border, glow shadow, and gradient. Success has shimmer animation. Warning has pulse animation. Dismissible shows X button. Auto-dismiss shows shrinking progress bar. Exports convenience components: ErrorMessage, SuccessMessage, WarningMessage, InfoMessage.
nodes.name: components/ui/validation-message.tsx

properties.title: Architecture Guide
properties.summary: Comprehensive guide to Collabryx project structure and architectural decisions covering feature-based architecture, Server Component First approach, tech stack (Next.js 16, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Supabase), data flow, component architecture, state management, authentication flow, database schema, and API design. Documents the full directory structure and core principles including server-first, type safety, feature-based organization, accessibility, and performance optimization.

properties.title: AI Assistant Technical Specification
properties.summary: Technical specification for the AI networking platform covering mandatory tech stack (Next.js 16, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, Zustand, Supabase), system architecture and data flow, database schema (profiles, profile_embeddings, connections, messages, assistant_threads, assistant_messages), Row Level Security policies, AI implementation details including embedding generation strategy using text-embedding-3-small, semantic matching with cosine similarity, AI provider registry, and the MVP checklist (Lean Canvas, Business Model analysis).

properties.title: API Reference
properties.summary: Complete API documentation for the Collabryx platform covering Server Actions for Posts (create, update, delete, react, share, pin), Comments (create, update, delete, react), Connections (send, accept, decline, remove, cancel), Notifications (mark read, delete, bulk delete, unread count), Matches (accept, dismiss, preferences, suggestions), and AI Mentor (create session, send message, get sessions, delete session, MVP checklist methods). Includes authentication via Supabase session with Bearer token.

properties.title: Authentication Guide
properties.summary: Complete guide to Collabryx authentication using Supabase Auth with email/password, OAuth providers (Google, GitHub), and magic link authentication. Covers client setup (createBrowserClient), server setup (createServerClient with cookie handling), authentication flow (sign up, sign in, sign out, email verification), protected routes via route groups, middleware protection, session management (getUser, getSession), and Row Level Security integration.

properties.title: Matching System
properties.summary: Documentation of the hybrid matching system combining semantic matching (vector embeddings), rule-based filtering (user preferences), and collaborative filtering (connection patterns). Covers scoring factors (semantic similarity 40%, shared skills 25%, shared interests 20%, activity level 10%, reciprocity 5%), match score calculation, implementation via match service and database functions, API endpoints for suggestions and score calculation, and optimization with HNSW indexes and caching.

properties.title: Messaging System
properties.summary: Real-time messaging system implementation guide covering Supabase Realtime for live message delivery, conversation management, message history, read receipts, and typing indicators. Covers database schema (conversations and messages tables), React hook (useChat) for message loading and real-time subscriptions, Supabase Realtime setup, typing indicator broadcasting, and API endpoints for conversations and messages.

properties.title: Vector Embeddings System
properties.summary: Complete guide to the vector embeddings system for semantic matching using all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model (384 dimensions). Covers system architecture with flow from user onboarding to profile text construction, Python worker generation, vector storage in pgvector, and cosine similarity search. Details database schema for profile_embeddings, embedding_dead_letter_queue, embedding_rate_limits, and embedding_pending_queue tables with HNSW indexing. Includes database functions for rate limit checking, queue management, and match retrieval.

properties.title: Vector Embeddings Infrastructure
properties.summary: Complete overview of the embedding generation system infrastructure with 384-dimensional vectors using all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Covers architecture flow from profile updates through pending queue, Python worker, and success/failure paths with DLQ. Details components including Python Worker endpoints (health, model-info, generate-embedding, queue/status), database tables with full schemas, triggers for automatic embedding generation, reliability features (dead letter queue with retry, rate limiting at 3/hour, pending queue), monitoring (health dashboard, metrics, log monitoring), and troubleshooting guide.

properties.title: Database Schema Reference
properties.summary: Complete reference for Collabryx database schema (34 tables) version 4.1.0. Documents all table groups: User Management (profiles, user_skills, user_interests, user_experiences, user_projects), Social Features (posts with optimistic locking, post_attachments, post_reactions, comments, comment_likes, connections), Matching System (match_suggestions, match_scores, match_activity, match_preferences), Messaging (conversations, messages with read_at), Notifications (notifications, notification_preferences), AI Features (ai_mentor_sessions, ai_mentor_messages), Preferences (theme_preferences), Analytics (4 tables), Vector Embeddings (4 tables), and Content Moderation (3 tables).

properties.title: Database Setup Guide
properties.summary: Step-by-step guide for setting up the Collabryx database schema in Supabase. Instructions to run only the master migration file (99-master-all-tables.sql) which creates all 34 tables. Covers embedding system setup with verification queries, Python worker configuration, skip email verification for development, table verification queries, RLS policy checking, index verification, and troubleshooting for duplicate tables, missing functions, and RLS conflicts.

properties.title: Performance Optimization Guide
properties.summary: Performance optimization guide covering bundle optimization (React Compiler, dynamic imports, tree shaking), React Query optimization with stale/gc time configuration and prefetching/optimistic updates, image optimization with Next.js Image and WebP/AVIF formats, font optimization with next/font, caching strategy for static pages and API routes, and database optimization including specific selects and query patterns.

properties.title: Python Worker Deployment Guide
properties.summary: Production deployment guide for the Python Worker embedding service on Render and Railway platforms. Covers pre-deployment checklist, Render deployment steps (Docker build, image push to registry, service creation, environment variables, health check configuration, auto-scaling with pricing estimates), Railway deployment steps (CLI installation, project creation, service configuration), database configuration with Supabase, environment variable reference, monitoring setup (health checks, log monitoring, alerts), and troubleshooting guide.

properties.title: Python Worker Development Guide
properties.summary: Local development and testing guide for the Python Worker embedding service using Docker. Covers prerequisites (Docker Desktop, Git), quick start with Docker build and compose, environment configuration with Supabase credentials, development workflow (logs, restart, stop), API testing endpoints (health, model-info, generate-embedding, generate-embedding-from-profile, generate-onboarding-embedding), and troubleshooting for common issues (port conflicts, model loading, Docker, Supabase connection, and embedding failures).

properties.title: Python Worker Overview
properties.summary: Core embedding service documentation for the self-hosted embedding generation using Sentence Transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dimensions). Covers setup with Python 3.9+, pip installation, requirements (fastapi, uvicorn, sentence-transformers, torch, pydantic), development server with uvicorn, deployment options (Railway, Render, Docker), API reference endpoints (service info, health check, model info, generate embedding, generate onboarding embedding), and troubleshooting.

properties.title: Deployment Checklist
properties.summary: Complete deployment checklist for Collabryx production covering pre-deployment (Supabase project setup, environment variables, database setup with 34 tables, Python worker), Vercel deployment (repository connection, build settings, environment variables), post-deployment verification (authentication, core features, performance), Python Worker deployment on Render (Docker, configuration, health check, auto-deploy), monitoring setup, rollback procedures, and common deployments (database migration, configuration changes).

properties.title: Docker Management Scripts
properties.summary: Documentation for fully automated Docker container management for the Python Worker Embedding Service via npm scripts. Covers core commands (docker:up, docker:down, down:clean, restart, rebuild), monitoring commands (logs, health, status), usage examples with expected outputs showing health check JSON response, health monitoring with success rate tracking, cleanup options, and production deployment commands.

properties.title: Deployment Guide
properties.summary: Complete deployment guide covering pre-deployment checklist (code quality, testing, security, performance, database), production environment variables (Supabase, application, Python Worker, AI providers with multi-provider failover, feature flags), embeddings system deployment, Vercel deployment with custom domain setup and automatic deployments, Netlify deployment with configuration, Docker deployment, AI provider configuration, domain and SSL setup, environment-specific variables (development, production), CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, and troubleshooting guide.

properties.title: Deployment Runbook
properties.summary: Step-by-step deployment runbook for production and staging environments covering pre-deployment checks (code quality, Python worker, database, infrastructure), deployment steps for frontend (Next.js on Vercel) and Python Worker (Docker), post-deployment verification (functional tests, performance checks, log verification), rollback procedures for Vercel frontend, Python worker, and database with rollback communication checklist, environment variable reference, and common issues troubleshooting.

properties.title: Git Workflow
properties.summary: Git branching, committing, and pull request guidelines covering branch naming conventions (feature, fix, docs, refactor, perf, test, chore prefixes), conventional commit format (type(scope): subject), commit best practices (imperative mood, 50-char subject, 72-char body), PR process (template, review process, pre-submit checklist), daily workflow commands, undo operations, and sync with main via rebase or merge.

properties.title: Contributing Guide
properties.summary: Comprehensive contributing guide covering code of conduct, getting started with prerequisites and finding issues, development process (fork and clone, branch creation, changes, testing, commits, PR creation), coding standards (TypeScript strict typing, absolute imports, React patterns, Tailwind CSS, conventions), commit guidelines with conventional commits, PR process with template, issue guidelines (bug reports, feature requests, questions), and community channels.

properties.title: Commands Reference
properties.summary: Complete reference for all npm scripts and commands covering core commands (dev, build, start, lint), testing commands with 118 test files and 750+ test cases across 10 modules (Environment, Auth, User Profiling, UI, Vector Embedding, Semantic Matching, Real-Time Networking, AI Mentor, Notifications, System Integration), watch and coverage modes, build commands (build:analyze, typecheck, clean), utility commands (format, seed, docker operations), Git commands, and Supabase commands (gen-types, db-push, db-diff).

properties.title: Environment Variables Reference
properties.summary: Complete reference for all environment variables covering required Supabase configuration (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY), optional variables (application, Python Worker URL, AI providers with multi-provider registry pattern AI_PROVIDER_N_* with auto-registration and automatic failover, legacy backward-compatible variables, feature flags), development vs production configurations, security notes (never commit secrets, environment isolation, least privilege), and setup guide with variable management strategies.

properties.title: Troubleshooting Guide
properties.summary: Common issues and solutions for Collabryx development covering installation issues (npm install failure, port conflicts), development issues (TypeScript errors, module not found), database issues (Supabase connection errors, RLS blocking queries), authentication issues (sign-in failures, session expiration), and build issues (type errors, blank page, deployment failures). Each issue includes symptoms, diagnostics, and step-by-step solutions.

properties.title: Database Seeding Quick Reference
properties.summary: Quick reference for database seeding commands covering module flags (profiles, posts, connections, matches, conversations, messages, notifications, mentor, embeddings), override flags (limit profiles/posts/connections/conversations), control flags (clear-first, skip-existing), common workflows (fresh database, add posts only, test with small data, regenerate everything), environment variables, Python worker management, verification SQL queries, and troubleshooting table.

properties.title: Database Seeding Guide
properties.summary: Comprehensive guide for the modular, environment-driven database seeder that creates realistic dummy data including 100+ user profiles, posts/comments/reactions, connections, match suggestions, conversations/messages, notifications, AI mentor sessions, and vector embeddings. Covers quick start, configuration with environment file and seeding toggles, seed limits, commands and flags, detailed seeding modules (profiles, posts, connections, matches, conversations, messages, notifications, mentor sessions, embeddings), troubleshooting, and data verification.

nodes.description: Activity tracking hooks with React Query mutations for tracking profile views and match building actions, plus query for activity feed. Uses CSRF-protected API calls with circuit breaker aware responses.

nodes.name: use-ai-stream.ts
nodes.description: AI streaming hook using Server-Sent Events (SSE) to stream AI responses from /api/ai/stream. Manages message history, streaming state, error handling, and provides onChunk/onComplete/onError callbacks.

nodes.description: React Query hooks for analytics dashboard: user analytics data, activity data for charts with configurable time ranges (7/30/90 days), CSV export mutation, and combined dashboard hook.

nodes.description: Authentication hook managing user session state via Supabase Auth with onAuthStateChange listener, signOut with React Query cache clearing to prevent data leakage between users, and redirect to /login.

nodes.name: use-cache.ts
nodes.description: Generic useCache hook implementing API â†’ Cache â†’ Fallback pattern with automatic cache fallback when API calls fail. Includes useCacheOnly for direct cache retrieval. Uses dashboard-cache and sonner toast for fallback notifications.

nodes.name: use-chat.ts
nodes.description: Chat hook for listing conversations with real-time subscription support. Fetches conversations from Supabase with joined profile data, auto-refreshes on postgres_changes events, and supports conversation selection navigation.

nodes.name: use-connection-requests.ts
nodes.description: Legacy state-based connection requests hook (non-React Query) managing received and sent connection requests with accept/decline/cancel actions. Uses Supabase client directly and logger for error tracking.

nodes.name: use-conversations.ts
nodes.description: Conversations listing hook using React Query. Fetches conversations from Supabase with both participant profile joins, resolves other user identity, formats relative timestamps, and uses QUERY_PRESETS for cache configuration.

nodes.name: use-embedding-queue-status.ts
nodes.description: Embedding queue monitoring hook with per-user status tracking and admin stats. Subscribes to Realtime changes on embedding_pending_queue table. Tracks pending/processing/completed/failed states with failure reason.

nodes.name: use-feed.ts
nodes.description: Feed hook providing personalized feed scoring with exponential backoff retry. Includes scorePosts function calling /api/feed/score with CSRF token, fetchFeed wrapper, and useScoreFeed mutation hook.

nodes.name: use-login-data.ts
nodes.description: Login data initialization hook that eagerly fetches 4 data sources on mount: feed posts, smart matches, user profile, and unread notifications. Uses React Query with retry and exponential backoff for resilience.

nodes.name: use-match-generation.ts
nodes.description: Match generation mutation hook that triggers the Python worker via /api/matches/generate. Shows toast notifications for success/error, invalidates match query keys on success, and supports configurable limit and min_score.

Static database of 1000+ skills across categories (technical, business, creative, blue-collar, etc.) used for skill matching and profile enrichment.

Database resilience layer: error classification (pool exhaustion, timeout, rate limit, network, auth), retry with exponential backoff, query timeout enforcement, circuit breaker integration, connection health monitoring, and combined withDatabaseProtection wrapper.
Deprecated query optimization wrapper (delegates to database-connection-manager), batch fetch with concurrency control, retry utility, and index recommendation generator.
Base application error classes: AppError, AuthError, ValidationError, NotFoundError, RateLimitError with type guard and safe error message extraction.
Match-specific error classification: MatchErrorType enum (7 types), MatchError class with factory methods from Supabase errors and generic errors, retry delay logic, and JSON serialization.
Client-side resource prefetching: route prefetch hook with priority queuing, font/image/script preloading, DNS prefetch and preconnect, and static preload links generation.

React Query cache configuration: default and preset cache time configs (realtime, user, content, analytics, static, mutation), cache key helpers for all entity types (users, posts, matches, notifications, messages, settings), and query utility functions.
RAG context orchestrator: coordinates profile fetch, vector retrieval, session summarization, and multi-user context assembly; builds final system prompt or falls back to default prompt.

Startup mentor and collaboration advisor prompt generators: stage-specific guidance (idea/validation/MVP/growth/scaling), team/partnership evaluation with skill complementarity analysis, and follow-up prompt for ongoing conversations.

User analytics service: fetches analytics data from user_analytics table with default values for new users, aggregates daily activity from events table, calculates engagement score (4 weighted factors), and CSV export.

Circuit breaker pattern: three states (closed/open/half-open), configurable failure/success thresholds and timeout, auto-recovery after timeout, fallback execution, singleton instance for match service, and statistics tracking.

Comments CRUD with Zod validation: fetch comments with nested replies in single query (N+1 elimination), batch like status checking, create/update/delete with auth verification, and comment like/unlike/toggle.

nodes.label: sanitize-input
nodes.summary: Comprehensive input sanitization utilities for security. Provides functions for sanitizing text, HTML, URLs, emails, filenames, JSON, and database inputs. Includes XSS prevention (escapeHtml, stripHtml, sanitizeHtml), URL validation (sanitizeUrl, sanitizeDomain), file safety (sanitizeFilename, validateFileExtension), prototype pollution blocking (sanitizeJson), email validation (sanitizeEmail), and a generic sanitizeInput function with typed schema-based field validation. Also validates input size to prevent rate limit bypass via array/object expansion.

nodes.label: validations/chat

Provides validatePostAttachment (MIME/size/name/dangerous chars checks), getPostAttachmentType, sanitizePostAttachmentFileName, and generatePostAttachmentFileName (timestamp+random+userID format).
nodes.name: lib/validations/post-attachments.ts

nodes.label: validations/settings

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the architecture docs, config, and package.json to understand Collabryx: a Next.js 16 + React 19 + Supabase collaborative platform with AI-powered matching, 3D visualizations, and enterprise security.

tour.title: Application Entry Point & Routing
tour.description: The root layout bootstraps Next.js with global CSS providers. The (auth) layout wraps authenticated routes with sidebar navigation, theme, and session management.

tour.title: Public Routes & Authentication Pages
tour.description: Public-facing pages handle landing, login, registration, password reset, and email verification. Auth forms use Supabase Auth with social providers and Zod validation.

tour.title: Core UI Components & Design System
tour.description: The design system uses shadcn/ui primitives with glassmorphism styling, theme provider, Radix UI accessibility, and Framer Motion animations. All built on Tailwind CSS v4.

tour.title: Supabase Auth & Data Layer
tour.description: Supabase provides authentication (email + OAuth), Row Level Security, and database access. Server/browser clients separate execution contexts; RLS policies enforce tenant isolation.

tour.title: Onboarding Flow
tour.description: Multi-step onboarding wizard collects user profile data, skills, experience, interests and goals. Server actions persist to Supabase and trigger embedding generation.

tour.title: Dashboard & Social Feed
tour.description: The dashboard page is the main landing after login, featuring an activity feed with posts, comments, connections, and activity tracking with real-time updates.

tour.title: AI Matching System
tour.description: Semantic matching computes compatibility scores between users using cosine similarity on vector embeddings. Includes skill alignment, preference filters, and AI-generated match insights.

tour.title: Messaging & Realtime Chat
tour.description: Real-time messaging with typings indicators, read receipts, conversation management, and file attachments. Uses Supabase Realtime for live message delivery.

tour.title: AI Mentor & RAG Pipeline
tour.description: The AI mentor guides users through startup validation with MVP checklists, Lean Canvas generation, and context-aware chat. RAG pipeline retrieves user profile context via vector similarity.

tour.title: Multi-Provider AI Layer
tour.description: Abstract provider interface with priority-based fallback. Supports MiniMax, OpenAI-compatible (OpenAI, Groq, Together, Ollama, etc.), and Anthropic providers with streaming SSE and error handling.

tour.title: 3D Visualizations & Landing Page
tour.description: Interactive 3D landing page with Three.js/React Three Fiber network visualization, mesh gradient backgrounds, and animated stat cards. Communicates the semantic matching value proposition.

tour.title: Notifications System
tour.description: Real-time notification delivery for matches, messages, connections, and system events. Supports in-app display with bell dropdown, notification preferences, and digest/cleanup jobs.

tour.title: Settings, Profile & User Management
tour.description: Profile editing with avatar/banner uploads, verification badges, privacy controls, notification preferences, skill management, experience entries, and account deletion.

tour.title: API Routes
tour.description: Next.js API route handlers for AI chat, match generation, embedding generation/status/DLQ, notification dispatch/digest/cleanup, content moderation, analytics, file uploads, and health checks.

tour.title: Python Worker & Embedding Service
tour.description: FastAPI-based Python microservice generates vector embeddings for user profiles using Sentence Transformers. Includes rate limiting, validation, and Docker deployment.

tour.title: Testing Infrastructure
tour.description: Comprehensive test suite with Vitest unit tests (hooks, lib, services, API), component tests (React Testing Library), integration tests (auth, embeddings, AI mentor, analytics), and E2E Playwright specs.

tour.title: CI/CD, Deployment & Infrastructure
tour.description: GitHub Actions CI runs typecheck, lint, tests, and Playwright E2E on push. Security pipeline audits dependencies. Docker files and Render config handle deployment.
